seoTitle: Encounter Bay vs Enfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Encounter Bay and Enfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Encounter Bay vs Enfield: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Encounter Bay and Enfield.
heading: Encounter Bay vs Enfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Encounter Bay, South Australia and Enfield, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Encounter Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Enfield (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Encounter Bay or Enfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Encounter Bay has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Enfield scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Encounter Bay scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Enfield scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Encounter Bay or Enfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Encounter Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
